---
name: Data correction
about: Report a correction to a source-qualified OPCC layer or release
title: "Correction: "
labels: correction
---

## Affected release or source layer

- OPCC vintage or source identifier:
- Postal code(s), if redistributable:
- Geography or point currently returned:

## Evidence for correction

Provide an open, reproducible source URL, licence, retrieval date, and a short
explanation of the lineage. Do not provide Canada Post, PCCF, PCCF+, or other
restricted evidence.

## Expected change

Describe the corrected source-qualified evidence. OPCC keeps prior releases
immutable; a correction is published as a new reviewed vintage.
